hypothesis: When only one entry slot remains, deferring breakout_long entries may improve sleeve routing by preserving scarce capacity for trend_long candidates.
change_summary: Added a default-off BacktestEngine hook, DEFER_BREAKOUT_WHEN_SLOTS_LTE, and replayed the scarce-slot breakout defer rule across the three fixed OHLCV windows. Production defaults remain unchanged.

market_regime_summary.mid_weak: rotation-heavy bull where accepted stack makes money but lags indexes
market_regime_summary.old_thin: mixed-to-weak older tape with lower win rate

delta_metrics.gate4_basis: Accepted as default-off research harness because EV improved in 2/3 windows with no regressions and mid_weak Sharpe daily improved by 0.19; not promoted to production because aggregate PnL materiality was only +$867.84 / about +1.2%.

llm_metrics.blocker_relation: LLM soft ranking has only a small production-aligned sample, so this deterministic sleeve-routing alpha was tested instead.

next_retry_requires: Do not turn this into broad breakout de-risking; it only applies when one slot remains.
Next valid retry should test production promotion only with stronger materiality or forward/paper confirmation.
Do not combine this with global MAX_POSITIONS changes; exp-20260427-014 rejected global capacity changes.
notes: Alpha search, not measurement repair. One causal variable changed in replay; production strategy defaults remain unchanged.
